description: Meeting Prep Autopilot: Gather calendar event details, attendee email history, CRM context, and relevant documents simultaneously, then synthesize into a comprehensive meeting prep doc with talking points

agents.name: calendar-agent
agents.role: Fetch target calendar event details including attendees, time, location, and recurrence info

agents.name: gmail-agent
agents.role: Gather email history and pending threads with meeting attendees

agents.name: notion-agent
agents.role: Pull CRM contact data, past meeting notes, and open action items from Notion

agents.name: drive-agent
agents.role: Search Google Drive for documents relevant to the meeting topic and attendees

agents.name: prep-lead
agents.role: Synthesize all gathered data into a comprehensive meeting prep document with framework-based talking points and save to Notion
